overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage exploring a dark gothic common room and adjacent dormitory with stone architecture, fireplaces, and green stained glass. The camera moves smoothly through atmospheric interior spaces illuminated by warm firelight and emerald window light.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate seating area with ornate fireplace

agents.ego_description: approaching the fireplace and observing the seating area, then looking around the room

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and carved serpent motifs on the mantelpiece
tufted red leather armchair with wooden frame
tall stone column supporting the vaulted ceiling
decorative circular window in the ceiling with metal tracery

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gothic common room with a focus on an ornate stone fireplace. The camera approaches the hearth, revealing leather armchairs and stone pillars in the warm firelight.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand common room hall with staircase

events.description: moving from the intimate fireplace nook into the larger main hall of the common room

agents.ego_description: walking through the main hall toward the grand staircase at the far end

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading upward with dark curtains at the landing
tall classical stone figure in an alcove
large hanging tapestry depicting figures in historical dress
ornate hanging light fixture with multiple candles

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions into a grand hall featuring a wide staircase, stone statues, and wall tapestries. The space opens up significantly from the previous intimate seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with green stained glass ceiling

events.description: entering a narrow corridor with distinctive green stained glass ceiling panels

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor toward a wooden door at the far end

entered.detail: arched ceiling with emerald green stained glass panels creating colored light
warm glowing wall-mounted lanterns lining the corridor
decorative metal balustrade along the corridor edge
heavy wooden door with art nouveau metalwork and stained glass panels

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a narrow corridor illuminated by green stained glass overhead and warm wall sconces. The camera moves toward an ornate carved wooden door at the corridor's end.

events.description: opening the wooden door and entering the dormitory room

agents.ego_description: approaching the carved door, opening it, and stepping into the dormitory

entered.detail: circular metal plaque with the number 5 mounted beside the door
four-poster bed with dark green velvet curtains
smaller stone fireplace with metal fire basket

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the carved wooden door, revealing a number 5 plaque, then opens it to enter a dormitory with canopy beds and a secondary fireplace.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory with multiple canopy beds

agents.ego_description: panning around the dormitory to observe the canopy beds, furniture, and architectural details

entered.detail: antique wooden writing desk with chair
tall dark wood cabinet with carved details
large patterned area rug covering the stone floor

segments.scene_description: Inside the dormitory, the camera explores a spacious room with multiple green-canopied beds, a central rug, wooden desks, and wardrobes, all beneath stone arch ceilings.

events.description: exiting the dormitory and returning to the corridor with green stained glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking back through the corridor, passing under the green glass arches

entered.detail: series of arched green glass windows along the corridor ceiling
ornate stone balustrades overlooking lower levels

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the dormitory and resumes walking through the corridor, passing under the distinctive green stained glass arches and ornate railings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate warmth of a gothic common room through a grand hall and into a private dormitory. It begins by approaching an ornate stone fireplace and leather armchairs before the space opens up into a grand hall filled with stone statues, wall tapestries, and a wide staircase. The camera then shifts into a narrow corridor illuminated by green stained glass and wall sconces, moving toward a carved wooden door marked with a number 5 plaque. Upon entering the dormitory, the view expands to reveal canopy beds, wooden desks, and stone arch ceilings, before the camera finally exits the room to resume its path back through the green-lit corridor and under ornate railings.
